## Screenshots

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`uv run ruff check .`)
- [ ] Typecheck clean (`uv run pyright`)
- [ ] OpenSpec proposal exists for non-trivial changes (`openspec/changes/<name>/`)
- [ ] README / docs updated where relevant
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commits signed off with `git commit -s` (DCO)
